liveWorkHint: Headless runtime output appears here while work is in progress. Formal replies are sent through message tools.
formalMessagesOnlyHint: Formal chat stays empty until someone sends an explicit message.
sendBlockedGroupStopped: This group is not running. Start the group before sending a message to agents.
sendBlockedGroupPaused: This group is paused. Resume the group before sending a message to agents.
modeNoticeNeedReply: Need Reply: recipients are expected to send a concrete reply.
modeNoticeImportant: Needs Ack: recipients are expected to acknowledge this message.
crossGroupAttachment: Attachments cannot be sent cross-group yet.
voiceSecretaryManualHint: Use this panel to start/stop microphone capture and maintain Voice Secretary working documents. Group enable/config live in Settings > Assistants.
voiceSecretaryWorkspaceHint: Capture speech, maintain working documents, and ask the secretary to refine or send them.
voiceSecretaryOpenPendingWorkspace: Open Voice Secretary workspace - {{count}} pending jobs
voiceSecretaryDisabledHint: Voice Secretary is off for this group. Enable the assistant here or in Settings > Assistants before recording.
voiceSecretaryEnabledForGroup: Voice Secretary enabled for this group.
voiceSecretaryDisabledForGroup: Voice Secretary disabled for this group.
voiceSecretaryServiceReady: Assistant service local ASR is ready to record.
voiceSecretaryServiceUnsupported: Browser audio capture is not available here. Switch to Browser ASR or use a browser with MediaRecorder support.
voiceSecretarySecureContextRequired: Microphone capture requires a secure browser context. Open this page through localhost or HTTPS, not a raw WSL IP over HTTP.
voiceSecretaryGetUserMediaUnavailable: This browser page cannot access the microphone API. Use Edge/Chrome on localhost or HTTPS and allow microphone access.
voiceSecretaryMediaRecorderUnavailable: This browser does not support MediaRecorder audio capture. Use Browser ASR or a browser with MediaRecorder support.
voiceSecretaryRecognitionBackendUnsuppor: Select a supported recognition backend in Assistants settings.
voiceSecretaryLanguageSaveFailed: Failed to update Voice Secretary language.
voiceSecretaryMicDefaultHint: Mic input uses the browser/system default for Browser ASR.
voiceSecretaryMicServiceHint: Audio is captured in the browser, then sent to the daemon-managed assistant service for local ASR.
voiceSecretaryAnotherRecording: Voice Secretary is already recording in group {{groupId}} in another active tab. Stop that recording before starting another one.
voiceSecretaryBrowserUnsupported: Browser speech recognition is not available here. Switch to Assistant service local ASR or use a supported browser.
voiceSecretaryBrowserAsrEndedWithoutTran: Browser ASR stopped without returning transcript. Check the microphone connection, site permission, and system input device, then try again.
voiceSecretaryBrowserBackendRequired: Switch recognition to Browser ASR in Assistants settings first.
voiceSecretaryBrowserBackendRequiredShor: Switch to Browser ASR to dictate.
voiceSecretaryServiceBackendRequired: Switch recognition to Assistant service local ASR in Assistants settings first.
voiceSecretaryServiceAsrNeedsCommand: Browser microphone capture is available, but the daemon-side local ASR command is not configured.
voiceSecretaryMicPermissionBlocked: Microphone permission is blocked. Allow microphone access for this site in the browser, then try again.
voiceSecretaryMicNotFound: No microphone was found or the selected microphone is unavailable.
voiceSecretaryMicBusyOrUnavailable: The microphone could not be started. Check whether another app is using it or the OS blocked access.
voiceSecretarySelectedMicUnavailable: The selected microphone is unavailable. Reset to the system default microphone and try again.
voiceSecretaryAudioTranscribeFailed: Voice Secretary could not transcribe the recorded audio.
voiceSecretaryServiceAsrCommandMissing: Audio was captured, but assistant service local ASR is not configured. Set CCCC_VOICE_SECRETARY_ASR_COMMAND on the daemon host, or switch to Browser ASR.
voiceSecretarySpeechRecovering: Browser speech recognition had a temporary {{code}} event and is recovering automatically.
voiceSecretarySpeechRepeatedTransientErr: Browser speech recognition kept disconnecting. Check the network/browser speech service, then start dictation again.
voiceSecretarySpeechStartFailed: Could not start browser speech recognition.
voiceSecretaryTranscriptPlaceholder: Stable transcript from dictation appears here; Voice Secretary updates the working document automatically.
voiceSecretaryTranscriptAppendFailed: Failed to save Voice Secretary transcript segment.
voiceSecretaryPrivacyHint: Raw transcript stays in assistant sidecar storage; the working markdown document is the user-facing artifact.
voiceSecretaryWorkingDocumentPending: Transcript will create a repo markdown document automatically.
voiceSecretaryDocumentPlaceholder: Edit the full markdown document here. Voice Secretary will keep maintaining it as transcript arrives.
voiceSecretaryDocumentPreviewEmpty: Transcript and Voice Secretary edits will appear here.
voiceSecretaryDocumentEditAriaLabel: Edit Voice Secretary working document markdown
voiceSecretaryCaptureTargetChangeFailed: Failed to change the default document.
voiceSecretaryDefaultDocumentHint: New transcript is written here by default
voiceSecretarySetDefaultDocumentHint: Set as the default document for new transcript
voiceSecretaryDefaultDocumentActiveAriaL: {{title}} is the default document for new transcript
voiceSecretarySetDefaultDocumentAriaLabe: Set {{title}} as the default document for new transcript
voiceSecretarySwitchDocumentConfirm: Switch documents and discard unsaved edits in this panel?
voiceSecretaryNoDocumentsHint: Start recording or create a document.
voiceSecretaryLoadLatestDocumentHint: Load the latest document from the daemon. Unsaved local edits in this panel will be replaced.
voiceSecretaryInstructionPlaceholder: Tell Voice Secretary how to refine, split, summarize, or send this document.
voiceSecretaryDocumentSaveFailed: Failed to save Voice Secretary working document.
voiceSecretaryDocumentInstructionFailed: Failed to send the request to Voice Secretary.
voiceSecretaryDocumentUnsavedBeforeReque: Save or discard local document edits before sending a request to Voice Secretary.
voiceSecretaryDocumentRequestStale: This document is no longer active. Refresh or choose another document before sending a request.
voiceSecretaryDocumentArchiveFailed: Failed to archive the Voice Secretary document.
voiceSecretaryTranscriptFeedHint: Recent ASR text for this tab. Stable chunks go to {{title}}.
voiceSecretaryTranscriptFeedEmpty: Start recording to see transcript here.
voiceSecretaryActivityPending: {{count}} transcript jobs are waiting for this document.
voiceSecretaryActivityRecording: Listening. Stable transcript will be folded into the active document.
voiceSecretaryActivityIdle: No pending work. Use recording or send a request.
teamReady: Team is ready. Say hi to your agents.
addForemanFirst: Add a foreman first, then peers.
launchAgents: Launch your agents and begin chatting.
replyTargetUnavailable: This message is not ready for replies yet.
imagePreviewHint: Click the backdrop or press Escape to close
noResultsHint: Try a different query, sender, or kind filter.
presentationTapToOpen: Tap a card to open it.
presentationClickToExpand: Click a slot to expand it.
presentationFileReady: This file cannot be previewed in Presentation yet.
presentationEmptyHelp: Tap an empty slot to pin a URL, pick a workspace file, or upload a snapshot.
presentationEmptyActionHint: Tap to pin a URL, pick from workspace, or upload a snapshot.
presentationEmptyReadOnlyHint: Waiting for an agent or an authorized user to publish here.
presentationPinHelp: Pin a URL, a workspace file, or an uploaded snapshot so it stays visible in this group's Presentation rail.
presentationReplaceHelp: Edit the current slot by updating it with a URL, a workspace file, or an uploaded snapshot.
presentationFileHint: Uploads are stored as a snapshot. HTML, PDF, images, Markdown, and regular files are all supported.
presentationWorkspaceHint: Link a file from this group's active workspace. Updates to that file will show up here without re-pinning.
presentationWorkspaceSelectionEmpty: Choose a file from this group's workspace.
presentationSummaryPlaceholder: Optional summary shown in the slot preview
presentationUrlInvalid: This does not look like a valid URL. Try example.com or localhost:3000.
presentationSnapshotLiveChangedHint: The current slot no longer matches this quote.
presentationEmbeddedModeHelp: Standard mode is lightweight. If links jump out or the page cannot load, switch to enhanced mode.
presentationInteractiveModeHelp: Enhanced mode works better for local or private pages and tries to keep navigation inside CCCC.
